content:
✨ llm_wiki_agent | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automatically build and maintain a personal, interlinked knowledge base (wiki) from diverse raw data sources, powered by an LLM.
✨ Key Features: • Ingests raw sources (URLs, PDFs, audio, video) • Extracts content using Apache Tika • Transcribes audio/video using OpenAI Whisper • Generates interlinked wiki pages compatible with Obsidian • Manages wiki content (CRUD, search, index, log)
📖 Summary: The llm_wiki_agent is a Kotlin-based server that acts as a toolkit for an LLM (Claude Code) to ingest various raw data sources like URLs, PDFs, and audio/video files. It extracts and processes this content, transforming it into an interlinked Obsidian-compatible wiki, enabling a personal knowledge management system.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
